parameters.content: Coding Exam - google AI Evaluate score

parameters.responseBody:
={{ {
  success: true,
  message: "Cost-optimized exam evaluation completed successfully",
  session_id: $json.session_id,
  ai_results: $json.ai_results,
  evaluation_summary: {
    total_score: $json.ai_results.total_score,
    status: $json.ai_results.status,
    multiple_choice_score: $json.ai_results.multiple_choice_score.score,
    coding_score: $json.ai_results.score_breakdown.coding,
    final_percentage: $json.ai_results.score_breakdown.percentage,
    tokens_used: $json.ai_results.evaluation_metadata.tokens_used,
    ai_model: $json.ai_results.evaluation_metadata.ai_model,
    evaluation_method: "cost_optimized_coding_only"
  },
  email_status: $json.email_status || { sent: false, error: "Email not configured" },
  timestamp: $json.timestamp,
  workflow_version: "v9-with-email"
} }}
